article_meta.title: Administration Trump says there will ‘likely be more’ American deaths in Iran before conflict ends by Max Rego - 03\/01\

reasoning: The summary remains neutral and descriptive, avoids adopting charged rhetoric from Trump’s statements, and attributes contested or declarative points (e.g., ship sinkings) appropriately. It does not introduce loaded language or opinionated framing in the model’s own voice.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like acknowledged, targeted, urged, estimated; avoids charged terms.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Factual details come from CENTCOM/The Hill; contested items are attributed to Trump or sourced.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments stated as facts; evaluative language appears only in attributed quotes summarized neutrally.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured and matter-of-fact despite dramatic events.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No character attacks in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions beyond reported statements.
custom_reasoning.slant: Covers U.S./CENTCOM updates, Trump’s statements, and Iranian state TV updates proportionally.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes all major perspectives present in the article.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Reflects the article’s balance without amplifying negative elements.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of official versus other sources beyond what the article includes.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Does not inherit loaded rhetoric from the article; attributes claims properly.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Represents CENTCOM, Trump, and Iranian state TV perspectives consistent with the source.
